stemHtml: A double white cross displayed horizontally in the signal area indicates that…

options.a: this area is unfit for the movement of aircraft.
options.b: special precautions must be observed due to the condition of this taxiway.
options.c: the aerodrome is being used by gliders and that glider flights are being performed.
options.d: special precautions are needed for landing on the runway in use.
